wol_abbreviation_search_guide.description: How to use abbreviations to quickly find publications on the wol.jw.org site.

basic_rule.what_the_number_is: It can represent the chapter, lesson, or page of the publication.

important_tips: When searching for a valid abbreviation, the first result will be a direct link to the document.

books_and_brochures.lff 5: Opens the book 'Enjoy Life Forever!', lesson 5.
books_and_brochures.rq 12: Opens the brochure 'What Does God Require of Us?', page 12.
books_and_brochures.bh 3: Opens the book 'What Does the Bible Really Teach?', chapter 3.

magazines.logic: Letter of the magazine (w = The Watchtower, g = Awake!) + Last two digits of the year.
magazines.w24: Brings up results for The Watchtower magazine from the year 2024.
magazines.g23: Brings up results for the Awake! magazine from the year 2023.
magazines.w15 15/2 4: Opens The Watchtower of 2015, February 15 issue, page 4.
magazines.w22.02 4 §§ 7 - 8: Opens The Watchtower of 2022, February issue, article or study 4, paragraphs 7-8.
